He did not expect to fall in love with someone who never changes.

...

Sir Bellaric, Rose of the Red Crown, is shaped by Young and Beautiful, where devotion is bound to youth and love is shadowed by time. Inspired by the song’s longing for permanence and its quiet insecurity, he lets Leon fall away, leaving a legend in his place as a safer thing to be loved.
